# Andrew Pizzeria

Andrew Pizzeria is a pizza restaurant located at 150 Madison Street in Oneida, New York. The business is looking to establish an online presence that supports food ordering and showcases multiple store locations, suggesting a growing local or regional pizza brand.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Craving Pizza on Thanksgiving? We&#39;re Open! — Andrew Pizzeria

URL: https://example.com
Description: Find restaurants open on Thanksgiving at Andrew Pizzeria in Oneida, NY. Savor handcrafted pizzas with Michelin-star flair. Order now and taste the tradition!

# Andrew Pizzeria


### Handcrafted pizza in the heart of Oneida, New York. Order from our growing family of local locations.


View Locations
Contact Us












## Featured Products

## Shop by Category

## Handmade pizza for everyday life


At Andrew Pizzeria, we believe great pizza shouldn't be reserved for special occasions. Our dough is made fresh daily, our sauce simmers slow, and every pie leaves our stone ovens with the kind of char and chew that makes a Tuesday night feel like a celebration.





### Stone-baked taste


Our 700°F stone decks lock in moisture and deliver the leopard-spotted crust that defines true artisan pizza. No shortcuts, no conveyor belts — just fire, flour, and patience.




### Built for busy nights


Order ahead through our app and your pizza is hot and ready when you pull up. We've designed every step — from dough ball to pickup window — to respect your time without compromising quality.




### Rooted in Oneida


150 Madison Street is where it started, but our kitchen has grown to serve families across the region. We're proud to be a local brand that neighbors count on, whether dining in or grabbing dinner to go.

























## Our Pizzerias


Rooted in Oneida, growing across the region. Each location is a warm, inviting space where artisan pizza and community come together.















### Oneida — Flagship


150 Madison Street

Oneida, New York


Our original home. A cozy, bustling spot where the aroma of wood-fired dough fills the air and every pizza tells a story. Stop by for a slice of the neighborhood.


Get Directions












### Coming Soon


Expanding in Central NY

Stay Tuned


We're scouting the perfect spot to bring our artisan pies to more neighborhoods. Sign up for updates and be the first to know when we open our doors near you.


Notify Me











### Future Home


Serving Your Community

Location TBA


Andrew Pizzeria is growing. We're dedicated to becoming a cherished part of more communities, serving the same quality and care you've come to love.


Learn More








Can't make it to us? Explore our ordering app and have your favorites delivered straight to your door, wherever you are.

Order Online














## The Easiest Way to Keep Pizza Night Moving


From your first craving to that final satisfied bite, our app puts the full Andrew Pizzeria experience right in your pocket. Order ahead, customize every pie, and skip the line — all with a few taps.










### Repeat-Friendly for Families


Save your favorite orders and re-order in seconds. Perfect for busy weeknights when everyone wants something different.











### Fast Decisions for Students


Browse our full menu with high-res photos and clear pricing. No more group-chat debates — just great pizza, fast.











### Simple Pickup for Professionals


Schedule your pickup down to the minute. Swing by our Madison Street location and grab your order without breaking stride.





Learn More About the App

Visit one of our locations or reach out to our team for store information and brand inquiries. We're ready to serve you the best pizza in Oneida and beyond.

Contact Us

# Neighborhood Pizza, Right Around the Corner


Andrew Pizzeria brings the warmth of a classic pizzeria to your neighborhood. With multiple locations ready to serve, we make it easy to enjoy handcrafted pizza, fresh ingredients, and the consistent quality you expect—whether you're dining in, picking up, or ordering for a cozy night at home. Find your nearest store and discover why families, students, and professionals across the region make us their go-to for pizza night.











### Deep Local Roots


Proudly serving Oneida and surrounding communities with recipes that feel like home.




### Easy Pickup & Ordering


Order ahead through our app or swing by—your pizza is ready when you are.




### Consistent Brand Experience


Every location delivers the same great taste, warm service, and quality you trust.

















## Our Pizzerias


Find an Andrew Pizzeria near you. Each location brings our artisan craft to your neighborhood with the same dedication to quality and flavor.

















### Oneida — Flagship


Downtown Oneida · Heart of Madison County



150 Madison Street, Oneida, New York


Our original home, where the ovens have been burning since day one. This is where our dough masters perfect every hand-tossed pie, serving the Oneida community with a dining room that feels like family. Stop by for our full artisan menu, or order ahead for pickup.



View on Map














### Hamilton — Campus


Colgate University Area · Student-Friendly



22 Broad Street, Hamilton, New York


Just steps from campus, our Hamilton spot is built for quick slices between classes and late-night study fuel. Grab a personal pie, connect to free Wi-Fi, and make yourself at home. Perfect for students and faculty alike.



View on Map














### Cazenovia — Downtown


Historic Main Street · Lakeside Community



45 Albany Street, Cazenovia, New York


Nestled in the charming lakeside village of Cazenovia, our downtown location offers a cozy retreat with artisan pizza and local craft beverages. Enjoy sidewalk dining in the summer and a warm hearth in the winter. A favorite for family dinners and date nights.



View on Map














### Canastota — Route 5


Convenient Highway Access · Family Pit-Stop



3104 Seneca Turnpike, Canastota, New York


Perfectly positioned for families on the go. Our Canastota location features a dedicated drive-up pickup window and spacious parking, making it easy to grab dinner on the way home from work, practice, or weekend adventures. Same artisan quality, with added convenience.



View on Map
















## Your Neighborhood Pizzeria


From family dinners to quick student meals, Andrew Pizzeria is the dependable stop that feels like home across every location.











### Family Evenings, Made Easy


When the week feels long and the fridge is empty, Andrew Pizzeria is the dependable dinner solution that brings everyone to the table. Our consistent quality across every store means parents can relax knowing the meal is handled—no stress, just hot, handcrafted pizza that tastes like tradition.











### Quick Bites, Student Life


Between classes and study sessions, you need food that’s fast, affordable, and actually satisfying. Our locations near campus keep the slices coming and the vibe casual. It’s the go-to group order spot where everyone can agree on great pizza without breaking the bank.











### After-Work Convenience


You’ve earned a great meal without the wait. Swing by on your way home and grab a pie that feels like a reward. Our streamlined pickup and consistent menu across Madison Street and beyond mean you get the same artisan quality every time, perfect for busy professionals who value both time and taste.
















## Let's Find Your Nearest Slice


Looking for a specific store, curious about holiday hours, or want to know which location delivers to your doorstep? Our team is ready to help you get exactly what you're craving, wherever you are.

Contact Our Team

✆ Prefer to call? Reach us at for immediate assistance with store locations and hours.












Artisan pizza crafted with passion, served with love. Bringing families together since 1998.

## Tap Into Michelin-Star Pizza at Home — Andrew Pizzeria

URL: https://example.com/ordering-app
Description: Use the Andrew Pizzeria ordering app for effortless takeout. Get restaurants open on Thanksgiving specials and CN Tower Restaurant-inspired pies delivered fast!

Tap Into Michelin-Star Pizza at Home — Andrew Pizzeria













































Skip to main content

















- Products Products




- Home
- Locations
- Ordering App
- Contact
0













Products
















The App



# Andrew Pizzeria,Now in Your Pocket


Experience the warmth of our ovens and the convenience of modern ordering. Andrew Pizzeria’s digital home brings our full menu, exclusive deals, and effortless pickup planning right to your fingertips — whether you're at home in Oneida or on the go.









### Effortless Repeat Ordering


Save your favorites and reorder in just two taps. Your go-to pizza is always waiting.










### Smart Pickup Planning


Schedule your pickup around your day. We’ll have it hot and ready when you arrive at 150 Madison Street.










### Consistent Across Locations


One app, every store. Enjoy the same quality and easy ordering no matter which Andrew Pizzeria you visit.







Download the App
Learn More



























## Why Order with Andrew's










### Faster Weeknight Decisions


Skip the dinner debate. With our easy-to-use ordering app, busy families can browse the full menu, customize every pie, and reorder favorites in seconds — so you spend less time planning and more time enjoying a hot, fresh meal together.









### Straightforward Group Ordering


Coordinating a study session or hangout? Our app makes group orders effortless. Everyone can add their go-to slice or specialty pizza to a shared cart, split the total automatically, and track delivery in real time — no complicated math or missed toppings.









### Efficient Lunch & Pickup Planning


Maximize your lunch break. Schedule your pickup order in advance, save your favorite office lunch combos, and breeze past the line at our 150 Madison Street location. Fresh, artisan pizza ready exactly when you need it — perfect for professionals on the go.























## Order Your Favorites, Effortlessly








### Saved Favorites


Keep your go-to pizzas and sides right at your fingertips. Reorder your custom creations in just a tap, so you spend less time deciding and more time enjoying.










### Easy Location Selection


Whether you're near our Madison Street flagship or one of our growing locations, the app finds the closest Andrew Pizzeria to get your order started fast.










### Simple Order Tracking


From the oven to your door, follow your pizza's journey with clear, straightforward updates so you always know when to expect your meal.
















## What Our Guests Are Saying


The Andrew Pizzeria app turns pizza night into the easiest decision of the week — here's how it's changing routines across Oneida.










"With three kids and two jobs, I don't have time to call in orders. The Andrew Pizzeria app remembers our usual — large pepperoni and a half-mushroom — and I can reorder in literally three taps. It's the only reason we still have pizza night."


### Busy Parent

Oneida, NY








"Between classes and my part-time gig, I live on my phone. The app is super clean — no clutter, no annoying pop-ups. I can grab a slice between lectures and it's ready when I walk in. Honestly, it's the best-designed food app I've used."


### College Student

Oneida, NY








"I manage a team downtown and we order lunch for the office at least twice a week. The group ordering feature is a lifesaver — everyone adds their own slice, I approve the total, and it arrives hot. Andrew Pizzeria makes me look like the office hero every time."


### Downtown Professional

Oneida, NY















## Ready to Experience Andrew Pizzeria?


Our ordering app is expanding to bring the authentic taste of our brick ovens directly to your door. Contact our team to learn more about app availability and find participating locations near you, including our flagship at 150 Madison Street in Oneida, New York.

Contact Us

# Get in Touch with Andrew Pizzeria


We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question about our menu, want to place a large order, or are looking to partner with a trusted local brand, the team at Andrew Pizzeria is here to help. Reach out and let's talk pizza.








### Our Flagship Location




150 Madison Street, Oneida, New York



[business_phone]



[business_email]



View on Map
























## Get In Touch


We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.




Full Name




Email Address




Phone Number




Your Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  |

Return Policy
and  Privacy Policy



Send Message






## We're Here to Help


Whether you're looking for the nearest Andrew Pizzeria location, have a question about our ordering app, or want to explore partnership opportunities, our team is ready to assist.





### Quick Responses


We typically respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days. For immediate assistance, please call us at .





### Location Questions


Looking for a specific store? Our team can direct you to the right location. Visit us at 150 Madison Street, Oneida, New York or check our locations page.





### Partnerships & General Inquiries


Interested in catering, franchising, or brand collaborations? Reach out directly and we'll connect you with the right department.





















## Visit Andrew Pizzeria







### Flagship Address


150 Madison Street Oneida, New York


Visit our original location for a true taste of artisan pizza. Additional locations may be available — check our locations page for a store near you.







### General Inquiries


[business_email]


For direct questions, feedback, or partnership opportunities, reach out via email. We respond within 24 hours.







### Store Discovery


Multiple Locations


We're growing! Use our locations page to find the nearest Andrew Pizzeria, view hours, and get directions.





150 Madison Street, Oneida, New York











## Experience Andrew Pizzeria in Person


We're more than just great pizza — we're a destination. Visit one of our welcoming store locations to enjoy the full Andrew Pizzeria experience, from our signature pies to the warm, artisan atmosphere that makes every meal memorable.

## Return Policy

URL: https://example.com/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Andrew Pizzeria




































































- Products Products




- Home
- Locations
- Ordering App
- Contact
0












Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/5/2026



At Andrew Pizzeria, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

































- Products Products




- Home
- Locations
- Ordering App
- Contact
0















# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/5/2026



Andrew Pizzeria ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Andrew Pizzeria

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

































- Products Products

# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 5, 2026



Andrew Pizzeria is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Andrew Pizzeria

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Artisan pizza crafted with passion, served with love. Bringing families together since 1998.

## Terms & Conditions

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 5, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Andrew Pizzeria

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Restaurant provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Andrew Pizzeria provides Restaurant through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Andrew Pizzeria. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Andrew Pizzeria

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
